title: with-mcp-artifact
description: SSOT schema for the bench skill's with-mcp.json artifact (Phase 3 output). Every field listed here is the authoritative definition — SKILL.md and prompts/03-with-mcp-run.md reference this file rather than duplicating field lists.

version.description: Artifact format version. Increment when a breaking change is made to the schema.

method.description: Identifies this artifact as the MCP-assisted run (Phase 3).

iteration.description: Iteration number when --iterations N > 1. Always 1 for single runs.

mcp_rpc_capture_error.description: Set when daemon log is unreadable (permissions, missing, sandbox). Phase 5 surfaces this in the report. Omitted when capture succeeded.

results.description: Per-question results, one entry per question from questions.json.

answer.description: The agent's prose answer. Must not include source-code content — reference by path:line.

confidence.description: Honest self-assessment of answer quality. 0.0 = unknown / refused.

unknown.description: True when the question was unanswerable through MCP alone.

estimated.description: True when token counts were estimated via char/4 because the host did not surface usage_info.

tool_calls.description: Ordered list of MCP tool invocations made while answering this question.

tool_call_count.description: Total number of MCP tool calls (length of tool_calls array, included for quick aggregation).

tools_used.description: Deduplicated list of tool names called for this question.

notes.description: Free-form agent notes: tool failures, widened queries, rotation events, etc.

args_digest.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the serialized arguments. Protects private entity strings.

ok.description: False when the tool returned an error.

QuestionMetrics.description: Per-question performance metrics. The mcp_rpc_* fields are populated by `archigraph bench-capture rpc --start $START --end $END` (see #2298). Null when capture failed or was unavailable.

input_tokens.description: Sum of usage_info.input_tokens + usage_info.cache_creation_input_tokens across all agent messages for this question.

output_tokens.description: Sum of usage_info.output_tokens across all agent messages for this question.

cache_read_tokens.description: Sum of usage_info.cache_read_input_tokens (effectively free; reported separately).

cache_creation_tokens.description: Sum of usage_info.cache_creation_input_tokens across all agent messages.

wall_clock_ms.description: Elapsed wall-clock time from question start to end, in milliseconds.

mcp_rpc_count.description: Number of [mcp-rpc] elapsed= lines captured from the daemon log in the question's byte window. Null when capture failed.

mcp_rpc_handler_ms_sum.description: Sum of all elapsed_ms values from daemon log lines in the question's window. Null when mcp_rpc_count is null or 0.

mcp_rpc_handler_ms_p50.description: 50th percentile (median) of per-call handler durations. Formula: sorted[(n-1)/2] for odd n; average of sorted[n/2-1] and sorted[n/2] for even n. Null when mcp_rpc_count is null or 0.

mcp_rpc_handler_ms_p99.description: 99th percentile of per-call handler durations. Formula: sorted[ceil(n*0.99)-1] clamped to [0, n-1]. Null when mcp_rpc_count is null or 0.

mcp_rpc_per_tool.description: Optional per-tool aggregation. Keys are tool names; values are ToolRPCStats. Null when mcp_rpc_count is null.

mcp_rpc_wire_bytes_sum.description: Sum of the final on-wire tool-result payload size (bytes, sum of len(TextContent.Text)) across all captured calls, measured daemon-side AFTER applyIDInterning (issue #2828). Compare against billed input_tokens to split daemon-side payload cost vs model ingestion. Null when mcp_rpc_count is null; 0 when only legacy log lines (without wire_bytes) were captured.

mcp_rpc_payload_token_estimate_sum.description: Sum of the char/4 token estimate of the wire payloads across all captured calls (issue #2828). Approximate (host tokenizer differs) — a relative lever-finder, not exact reconciliation. Null when mcp_rpc_count is null; 0 when only legacy log lines were captured.

ToolRPCStats.description: Per-tool aggregation of daemon-side handler durations. This is also the top-level output shape of `archigraph bench-capture rpc` (the mcp_rpc_per_tool values).

count.description: Number of RPC calls for this tool in the captured window.

sum_ms.description: Sum of handler durations in milliseconds for this tool.

sum_bytes.description: Sum of on-wire payload bytes for this tool (issue #2828). 0 for legacy log lines without wire_bytes.

sum_token_est.description: Sum of char/4 payload token estimates for this tool (issue #2828). 0 for legacy log lines.

BenchCaptureOutput.description: Top-level JSON output of `archigraph bench-capture rpc`. Matches the mcp_rpc_* fields in QuestionMetrics so the CLI output can be merged directly into a question's metrics block.

mcp_rpc_count.description: Number of [mcp-rpc] elapsed= lines found in the captured log window.

mcp_rpc_handler_ms_sum.description: Sum of all captured elapsed_ms values.

mcp_rpc_handler_ms_p50.description: 50th percentile handler duration. Null when count=0.

mcp_rpc_handler_ms_p99.description: 99th percentile handler duration. Null when count=0.

mcp_rpc_per_tool.description: Per-tool aggregation. Empty object when count=0.

mcp_rpc_wire_bytes_sum.description: Sum of on-wire tool-result payload bytes across all captured calls, measured daemon-side AFTER applyIDInterning (issue #2828). 0 when only legacy log lines (without wire_bytes) were captured.

mcp_rpc_payload_token_estimate_sum.description: Sum of char/4 payload token estimates across all captured calls (issue #2828). 0 when only legacy log lines were captured.
